message:
feat(lean): enrich refinement map with ownership, routing metadata, and conformance tests

Add structured ownership and operational metadata to the runtime state
refinement map, making every operation mapping and divergence route
self-documenting for CI triage and multi-owner coordination.

runtime_state_refinement_map.json:
- Operation mappings: add owner field and update_trigger_conditions
  array to all 8 operation entries (reserve, commit, abort, leak,
  cancelRequest, complete, close, scheduleStep, race_scope), specifying
  who owns each mapping and what changes trigger mandatory updates
- Divergence routes: add fix_direction (runtime-code | formal-model |
  assumption-harness), owner_assignment with primary/secondary/escalation
  roles, required_artifact_updates list, and
  ci_conformance_failure_references to all 3 route definitions
- Routing examples: add rejected_routes, owner_assignment_decision,
  artifact_updates, and ci_conformance_reference to the bd-cspxm
  historical routing example

runtime_state_refinement_map.rs conformance tests:
- Operation mapping validation: assert owner is non-empty string;
  assert update_trigger_conditions is non-empty array of non-empty
  strings
- Divergence route validation: assert fix_direction matches canonical
  enum; assert owner_assignment has all 3 required role keys;
  assert required_artifact_updates and ci_conformance_failure_references
  are non-empty arrays of non-empty strings
- Routing example validation: assert rejected_routes is non-empty with
  canonical values that exclude the selected route;
  assert owner_assignment_decision has all 3 required keys;
  assert artifact_updates is non-empty;
  assert ci_conformance_reference has profile/failure_bucket/
  conformance_test fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -37,6 +37,21 @@
           "src/runtime/**",
           "tests/refinement_conformance.rs"

+          "escalation_owner_role": "CI/governance owner"
+        },
+        "required_artifact_updates": [
+          "formal/lean/coverage/runtime_state_refinement_map.json",

+        "assigned_bead_owner": "bd-cspxm owner",

       "decision_rationale": [
         "Failure frontier was concentrated in Lean theorem proof-shape errors, not runtime behavior drift.",
         "Rust conformance behavior for mapped operations remained consistent during the same window.",
         "Fixes were localized to Lean helper ordering and branch proof structure."

+      },

           "artifact": "target/lean-e2e/bd-cspxm_frontier.json",
